title: Irish Gooey Garlic Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful stir fry dish with Irish sausages, gooey cheese, and aromatic garlic.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Irish sausages and cook for 5 minutes, until browned.
Add 1 clove of garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the shredded gooey cheese and stir until melted.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the cheese is gooey and the sausages are cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
